# Stock Picking Delivery Link

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:298535da907c34aba0c19cacc06258f7f713e2c746a5ce87dd566765c24d2562

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds a link to the delivery (and its carrier) on all intermediate
operations (from a pick or a pack in a pick/pack/ship setup for instance).

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_delivery_link.models.stock_picking.StockPicking._get_ship_from_chain
documentation: Returns the shipment related to the current operation.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_delivery_link.models.stock_picking.StockPicking._set_delivery_package_type
documentation:
As we want to filter package types on carrier even on internal
pickings, we pass the delivery type to the context from
the related carrier taken from the delivery picking.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_delivery_link.tests.test_delivery_link.TestStockPickingDeliveryLink.test_put_in_pack_from_pick_with_wizard
documentation:
Normally the "choose package type" wizard is triggered only if a carrier is
set on the picking (usually on ship picking). This module permits to force
the wizard if there is no carrier set but if there is a shipping carrier and
set_delivery_package_type_on_put_in_pack set on the package type.

Try with forcing from pick picking type => wizard ok

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_delivery_link.tests.test_delivery_link.TestStockPickingDeliveryLink.test_put_in_pack_from_pick_with_wizard_carrier
documentation:
Normally the "choose package type" wizard is triggered only if a carrier is
set on the picking (usually on ship picking). This module permits to force
the wizard if there is no carrier set but if there is a shipping carrier and
set_delivery_package_type_on_put_in_pack set on the package type.

Try with forcing from pick picking type => wizard ok

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_delivery_link.tests.test_delivery_link.TestStockPickingDeliveryLink.test_put_in_pack_from_pick_without_wizard
documentation:
Normally the "choose package type" wizard is triggered only if a carrier is
set on the picking (usually on ship picking). This module permits to force
the wizard if there is no carrier set but if there is a carrier on shipment
picking and set_delivery_package_type_on_put_in_pack set on the picking type.

Try without forcing from pick picking type => no wizard

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_delivery_link.tests.test_delivery_link.TestStockPickingDeliveryLink.test_put_in_pack_from_ship_with_wizard
documentation:
Let the warehouse configuration to one step delivery
Create a delivery picking
Set a carrier on it
Launch the put in pack operation
The current_package_carrier_type in context should be 'none'
